testCaseName: Controllers não devem importar repositórios diretamente
name: Controllers não devem importar repositórios diretamente

statusDetails.message:
Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'no classes that reside in a package 'com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces..' should depend on classes that reside in a package 'com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure..', because Controllers devem falar apenas com Services. Acesso direto a repositórios em controllers quebra o isolamento de camadas e dificulta testes unitários.' was violated (6 times):
Constructor <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.asset.controller.AssetHistoryController.<init>(com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetStatusHistoryRepository, com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetAssignmentHistoryRepository)> has parameter of type <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetAssignmentHistoryRepository> in (AssetHistoryController.java:0)

Field <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.asset.controller.AssetHistoryController.assignmentRepository> has type <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetAssignmentHistoryRepository> in (AssetHistoryController.java:0)
Field <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.asset.controller.AssetHistoryController.statusRepository> has type <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetStatusHistoryRepository> in (AssetHistoryController.java:0)
Method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.asset.controller.AssetHistoryController.getAssignmentHistory(java.lang.Long)> calls method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetAssignmentHistoryRepository.findByAssetIdOrderByChangedAtDesc(java.lang.Long)> in (AssetHistoryController.java:71)
Method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.asset.controller.AssetHistoryController.getStatusHistory(java.lang.Long)> calls method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.asset.repository.AssetStatusHistoryRepository.findByAssetIdOrderByChangedAtDesc(java.lang.Long)> in (AssetHistoryController.java:45)
